headlines: AI slop writing has taken over the internet, particularly LinkedIn and X
AI tool scours the web for job openings, preps your resume and cover letter
OpenMandriva claims disgruntled admin trashed repos after community bust-up
SAP makes it easier for customers to shop for legacy product support, ending EU antitrust probe
crew_quote: "With AI writing junk for jobs, I guess I should've let it write my resume instead of putting curry stains all over it—might’ve landed me a better gig than cleaning this heap!"
